text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's sunset and Manhattan Cafe and I are taking a
stroll through town, making sure to avoid the
evening sun, when...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Look... Ahead of us... there's a big crowd...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Why don't you give it a go? Yes, you, the trainer in the back!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A raffle...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I didn't see your buddy there! Y-you're
more than welcome to join the fun too, little
lady...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance at my right hand to see that I'm already
holding a raffle ticket. I don't remember taking
one, though...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... Why don't we give it a try? This is probably
some sort of sign...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Convinced, we grab the lever together. The raffle
tumbler spins, whirring like the cogs of destiny!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: We won... the hot spring coupon!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The hot springs... First you trek to an inn deep in
the mountains, where you take a long, warm soak
in the spring waters... And then you...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Just go to bed?
choice_data_list:
Well, you could also have a nice chat or a good
meal.

Well, you could also have a nice chat or a good
meal.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's... true. You could do those things as long
as you had company.
choice_data_list: You should go with your friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...With my friend?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But she wouldn't need a ticket. What are you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find myself the subject of a baffled look. I
decide to go ahead and pass the ticket to her,
when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It vanishes right out of my hand! Where the heck
did it go?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... very much. It's kind of you to hold
onto the ticket for me. Let's go when our schedule
opens up.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you don't lose it in the meantime.
Although, even if you do... I'm sure it'll find its
way back into your pocket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next moment, the vacation ticket is snug in
my pocket. I'd better keep this lucky ticket safe
and sound.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The deluxe carrot hamburger steak... This is a
pretty good prize...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Look. The carrot's sticking out of the hamburger
steak.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's rather cute. It's almost like...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
A gravestone on a hilltop. A forgotten grave...
that no one visits.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Let's imagine it as we eat. What type of person
could it be, resting eternally below the ground?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her statements might be a little... detached from
reality, but Manhattan Cafe looks happy. We
enjoy the hamburger steak together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Carrots... And there are quite a lot of them. I'm
happy to win all of these, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I don't think my stomach can handle this many.
Could we save these carrots until tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, sometimes when you wait a day, a few of
them disappear, don't they? If some of them
vanish, I think we could comfortably finish off
whatever's left.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Did I say something strange?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We wait and eat the carrots the following day. I
lack the courage to count them before we dig in.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A carrot... A single carrot.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But perhaps we should be grateful. This actually
reminds me of a certain fable...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There once was a single carrot. Just the one. But
the townspeople planted it in the ground, and
hoped for the best. And then, miraculously...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Its roots stretched out and spread underneath the
entire town. And before long, carrots were
cropping up everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The townspeople were delighted. However, there
were so many carrots that no matter how many
they ate, they could never finish them...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, an orange forest consumed the town,
and the carrots formed a spire that rose into the
sky, and...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, about that carrot... should we plant it when
we get back? Or should we just eat it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We split the carrot and wolf it down in a hurry. It
isn't especially filling, but I feel an immense sense
of relief.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A pack of tissues...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Shall we burn them?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Shall we bring them to life and make them move
around?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, okay. So they can just be tissues, then.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: To be used... and thrown away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A vague shadow descends over Manhattan Cafe's
face. Is she... disappointed?
